action.reasoning: Observation: the camera-conditioned UNet checkpoint is trained and local prediction succeeded; we still only have the old TripoSR eval score, so the key missing information is whether this learned model actually improves LPIPS. Analysis: the most valuable next action is immediate evaluation submission of cam_unet.pt before spending more iterations on architecture/training changes. Decision: submit the current learned checkpoint with the existing predict.py now.
